CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups (soft credit). Do not edit manually. Counts won Opportunities closed in the last N days where this Contact received a soft credit. The value of N is configured in NPPatch Settings | Donations | Donor Statistics. Uses the Won Opportunities for Soft Credit filter group.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The number of soft credits this Contact received from won Opportunities closed in the last N days. N is set in NPPatch Settings.
CustomField.label: Number of Soft Credits Last N Days
